review_title: Useful vulnerability scanning tool for websites
description: I run two WordPress and two Laravel websites and they are now protected by their vulnerability scanners and health checks.
author: Alaister L.
pros: There are many scans available for a range of applications like WordPress and Laravel. The scan process only takes around 10 seconds to finish.
cons: There should be a one-click scan button running all vulnerability scanners of a type of software, instead of using them one-by-one in the Scan Repository.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: As a new user of this tool, it doesn't really hard to explore and use this. It really save up our time and money.
cons: Much better if we would experience more features on free trial.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Smaran C.
pros: The speed and the user experience are the greatest thing i have experienced.
cons: Some features should be available in free plan as well.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great to scan for vulnerabilities on a regular basis
description: I understand that they are still on their Beta version, so I would expect them to improve their product for the time they begin to charge us for their services.
author: Fatih Sinan Y.
pros: I like that it is free and easy to use. I have been a user for almost a year now, and the new UI is way more advanced and easier comparing with the one they had before.
cons: The new UI doesn't let me to scan for all the vulnerabilities, it is the only thing I would prefer in the old one rather than the new one, even if it's more thorough right now. It really doesn't matter to me as I know what to scan for in specific. But, it would be a nice-to-have when I deploy a new big change in our website.

review_title: Awesome Security Product for Security Professionals Bug Bounty Hunters
author: Shuvam A.
pros: Unlike other products , the speed is very awesome . It can detect deeper attack surface and it is easy to use .
cons: Overall performance is good . More features must be integrated with free plan .New users can be given free access to paid plans at least for a day .
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I have tried some automated tools in the past but SfE seems better so far, and saved a lot of time
cons: Just like any other automated tool, there is some false positives, but if you know penetration testing you can always take a look at the report and identify those.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Good product and is user friendly
author: Karan Preet S.
pros: Good for reporting tool, seems user friendly
cons: context focus could be less important sometimes
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Mihir J.
pros: Best part of subscription is weekly newsletter by Security for Everyone
cons: None everything is as expected & promised.

description: Found two critical malware on my website for free. I am waiting for their plans now.
author: Ugur D.
pros: What I like about Sec4e is the ease of use to protect my web site.
cons: I think they could come up with a better UI.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Useful cyber security tools to use
author: Mehriniso K.
pros: I've used Web App Vulnerabilities scanning tools to test my apps. With an expert feature mode, it is very functional to create HTTP requests. I can check if the changes are functional or not through re-scan option. Besides commands in video output are useful and educational to test in local.
cons: Manually scanning mode can be complicated for someone who is totally not familiar with the scanning tools.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

pros: The vuln scanning portion, is a real gem consisting of good and advanced features.
cons: Well.there is nothing up.in any of the tools for which we must talk wring, after seeing the efforts behind it This is also one of the awesome tools, which covers its scope properly m

pros: Good information i found using tool alot to learn

review_title: Useful and Powerful, but not easy to use
author: Fei K.
pros: There are a lot of scans available, covering many commonly-used web apps. The scan is also very fast. A lot of educational information is provided for those with less experience with web security.
cons: There is no automatic scheduled scanning, no suggested scan tools, and the interface is a little difficult to navigate. For an operator of a personal blog, this means spending a lot of time trying to find the test I should use and still not knowing whether I am still missing something.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
